data.title: Here's How Much $1000 Invested In Celsius Holdings 10 Years Ago Would Be Worth Today
Medicare To Cover Eli Lilly's Weight Loss Drug Zepbound For Obstructive Sleep Apnea Treatment
data.description: Medicare now covers Eli Lilly's Zepbound for obstructive sleep apnea, FDA-approved for obesity and sleep apnea treatment, reducing apnea events by 62.8%.

data.title: Clear Channel Outdoor Plans $375 Million Debt Repayment Following $625 Million Sale of European Operations
data.description: Clear Channel aims to grow its "America and Airports segments to organically improve cash flow and reduce leverage on our balance sheet."

data.title: Polestar Sees 5.3% Increase In Q4 Retail Sales, Order Intake Surges 37.2%
data.description: Polestar CEO Michael Lohscheller says the changes to the company's commercial operations were central to the growth.

data.title: Canadian Natural Resources Sets $4.2 Billion Budget For 2025, Targets 12% Production Growth
data.description: Canadian Natural Resources sets 2025 budget of C$6 billion for production growth and capacity expansion, including acquisitions.
